# Agent Handoff Matrix

| From Agent | Common Handoff To | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| Claim Director / Orchestrator Agent | Estimate Auditor when carrier estimate is provided | Estimate Auditor when carrier estimate is provided |
| Claim Director / Orchestrator Agent | Contents Claim Builder when personal property is involved | Contents Claim Builder when personal property is involved |
| Claim Director / Orchestrator Agent | Invoice Generator when user needs a billable document | Invoice Generator when user needs a billable document |
| Claim Director / Orchestrator Agent | Supplement Writer when deficiencies must be argued | Supplement Writer when deficiencies must be argued |
| Claim Director / Orchestrator Agent | QA Agent before final release | QA Agent before final release |
| Estimate Auditor Agent | Spreadsheet Agent | Spreadsheet Agent for workbook output |
| Estimate Auditor Agent | Supplement Writer | Supplement Writer for argument drafting |
| Estimate Auditor Agent | Electrical or Flooring Auditor | Electrical or Flooring Auditor for trade-specific review |
| Line Item Explainer Agent | Estimate Auditor if many line items need review | Estimate Auditor if many line items need review |
| Line Item Explainer Agent | Supplement Writer if line is under-scoped | Supplement Writer if line is under-scoped |
| Calculation Forensics Agent | Spreadsheet Agent | Spreadsheet Agent for workbook |
| Calculation Forensics Agent | QA Agent | QA Agent for math verification |
| Electrical Scope Auditor Agent | Supplement Writer | Supplement Writer for carrier letter |
| Electrical Scope Auditor Agent | Invoice Generator if electrician invoice is needed | Invoice Generator if electrician invoice is needed |
| Electrical Scope Auditor Agent | Evidence Organizer | Evidence Organizer for photos/inspection records |
| Flooring Scope Auditor Agent | Spreadsheet Agent | Spreadsheet Agent for flooring workbook |
| Flooring Scope Auditor Agent | Supplement Writer | Supplement Writer for matching/continuity letter |
| Contents Claim Specialist Agent | Invoice Generator | Invoice Generator for billable invoice |
| Contents Claim Specialist Agent | Evidence Organizer | Evidence Organizer for photos/inventory |
| Contents Claim Specialist Agent | QA Agent | QA Agent for category separation |
| Mitigation & Restoration Scope Agent | Contents Specialist | Contents Specialist for personal property |
| Mitigation & Restoration Scope Agent | Reconstruction Scope Builder after dry standard achieved | Reconstruction Scope Builder after dry standard achieved |
| Mitigation & Restoration Scope Agent | Invoice Generator | Invoice Generator for mitigation invoice |
| Reconstruction Scope Builder Agent | Invoice Generator | Invoice Generator for proposal/invoice |
| Reconstruction Scope Builder Agent | Supplement Writer | Supplement Writer for carrier submission |
| Reconstruction Scope Builder Agent | Payment Control | Payment Control for draw schedule |
| Supplement Writer Agent | Evidence Organizer | Evidence Organizer for exhibit list |
| Supplement Writer Agent | QA Agent | QA Agent for claim risk review |
| Invoice & Proposal Generator Agent | Spreadsheet Agent | Spreadsheet Agent for line item workbook |
| Invoice & Proposal Generator Agent | QA Agent | QA Agent for totals and category review |
| Spreadsheet Builder Agent | QA Agent | QA Agent for formula verification |
| Spreadsheet Builder Agent | Estimate Auditor if extraction uncertain | Estimate Auditor if extraction uncertain |
| Evidence Organizer Agent | Supplement Writer | Supplement Writer for exhibit citations |
| Evidence Organizer Agent | QA Agent | QA Agent for sufficiency review |
| Draw Schedule, Lien Waiver & Closeout Agent | Reconstruction Scope Builder | Reconstruction Scope Builder for milestone definitions |
| Draw Schedule, Lien Waiver & Closeout Agent | Spreadsheet Agent | Spreadsheet Agent for payment tracker |
| Code, Permit & Upgrade Analyzer Agent | Supplement Writer | Supplement Writer for ordinance/law request |
| Code, Permit & Upgrade Analyzer Agent | Payment Control | Payment Control for inspection triggers |
| QA, Consistency & Claim-Risk Agent | Back to source agent | Back to source agent for correction |
| QA, Consistency & Claim-Risk Agent | Orchestrator | Orchestrator for final packaging |
| Claim Project Manager Agent | Orchestrator | Orchestrator for routing |
| Claim Project Manager Agent | Evidence Organizer | Evidence Organizer for document gaps |
| Claim Project Manager Agent | Supplement Writer | Supplement Writer for carrier actions |
